      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-NO-RETRIEVAL-MUTATION No Retrieval Artifact Mutation
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-LOCAL-PREVIEW Deterministic Intermediate Preview
      STATEMENT: Deterministic preprocessing shall update the SuperPrompt instance supplied by the orchestrator.

      It shall not create a hidden parallel prompt object or replace the active SuperPrompt without an explicit orchestration requirement.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-LOCAL-PREVIEW
    5.9. Deterministic Intermediate Preview UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-LOCAL-PREVIEW STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-IN-PLACE-UPDATE In-Place SuperPrompt Update
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CENTRAL-PROJECTION Central Prompt Projection after Preparation
    STATEMENT: Deterministic preprocessing may create an intermediate prompt preview from the currently populated prompt fields.

    That intermediate preview shall not supersede the final centralized projection performed after relation classification and A2 shaping.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CENTRAL-PROJECTION
      5.10. Central Prompt Projection after Preparation UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-CENTRAL-PROJECTION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-LOCAL-PREVIEW Deterministic Intermediate Preview
      STATEMENT: At the completion of the composite preprocessing operation, the controller shall invoke the central SuperPrompt projection path so that prompt_ready reflects the current body fields, evidence policy, ActiveBrief routing state, and current lifecycle state.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-LOCAL-PREVIEW
      5.9. Deterministic Intermediate Preview UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-LOCAL-PREVIEW STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-IN-PLACE-UPDATE In-Place SuperPrompt Update
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CENTRAL-PROJECTION Central Prompt Projection after Preparation
      STATEMENT: Deterministic preprocessing may create an intermediate prompt preview from the currently populated prompt fields.

      That intermediate preview shall not supersede the final centralized projection performed after relation classification and A2 shaping.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-CENTRAL-PROJECTION
    5.10. Central Prompt Projection after Preparation UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-CENTRAL-PROJECTION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-LOCAL-PREVIEW Deterministic Intermediate Preview
    STATEMENT: At the completion of the composite preprocessing operation, the controller shall invoke the central SuperPrompt projection path so that prompt_ready reflects the current body fields, evidence policy, ActiveBrief routing state, and current lifecycle state.

    6. 6. ActiveBrief Selection and Classifier Input
    After deterministic prompt structuring, GHOST evaluates the current request against the current eligible ActiveBrief when one exists.

    ActiveBrief creation and durable memory ownership remain outside this file. This file owns only the selection input needed for relation classification and prompt routing.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROOT
      1.1. Preprocessing and Prompt Functions Scope UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROOT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SRS-FILE-TREE Requirement File Tree Parent Anchor
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-PRODUCT-NAME Product and Package Naming Boundary
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-THREE-PART-MODEL Three-Part Prompt-Preparation Model
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CURRENT-SCOPE Current Executable Scope
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-END-TO-END-FLOW Raw-Input-to-Retrieval-Handoff Flow
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-SCHEMA-LOAD Prompt Schema Loading
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-NONEMPTY-INPUT Non-Empty Raw Input Processing
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-IN-PLACE-UPDATE In-Place SuperPrompt Update
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-OPTIONAL Optional ActiveBrief Input
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION Two Independent Classification Dimensions
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-A2-INPUT-STATE A2 Input State
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-QUERY-FINALIZATION Post-Classification Retrieval-Query Finalization
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-SCHEMA-ERROR Prompt Schema Failure
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-ERROR Relation Classifier Failure Integrity
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-A2-ERROR A2 Failure Integrity
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-NO-UNNECESSARY-CLASSIFIER-CALL No Unnecessary Relation-Classifier Call
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-LOGGING-BOUNDARY Prompt Preparation Logging Boundary
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DETERMINISTIC-REPRODUCIBILITY Deterministic Reproducibility
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TESTABILITY Prompt Function Testability
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-NO-HIDDEN-HEURISTICS No Hidden Prompt Heuristics
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CODE-TRACE-ANCHORS Prompt Function Code Trace Anchors
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-SIBLING-OWNERSHIP Sibling Requirement Ownership
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CURRENT-FUTURE-BOUNDARY Current and Future Prompt-Function Boundary
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall provide one prompt-preparation capability that transforms raw user input into a structured and routed SuperPrompt ready for downstream Knowledge Management and Memory Management processing.

      The capability shall include deterministic preprocessing, ActiveBrief relation classification, deterministic routing decisions, A2 PromptShaper execution, synchronized retrieval-query construction, and final prompt-preview projection.

      The capability shall stop at the handoff boundary and shall not execute document retrieval, memory retrieval, document reranking, evidence selection, evidence condensation, or memory-context synthesis.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-OPTIONAL
    6.1. Optional ActiveBrief Input UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-OPTIONAL STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROOT Preprocessing and Prompt Functions Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-ELIGIBILITY Current Eligible ActiveBrief
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF-BYPASS No-ActiveBrief Classifier Bypass
    STATEMENT: Prompt preparation shall support execution with or without a configured memory manager and with or without an eligible ActiveBrief.

    Absence of an ActiveBrief shall be a valid routing state and shall not be treated as an LLM failure.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-ELIGIBILITY
      6.2. Current Eligible ActiveBrief UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-ELIGIBILITY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-OPTIONAL Optional ActiveBrief Input
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-SNAPSHOT ActiveBrief Snapshot
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CURRENT-PROMPT Classifier Current-Prompt Projection
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-OWNERSHIP ActiveBrief Durable-Truth Boundary
      STATEMENT: When a memory manager is available, the classifier input shall use the latest eligible memory record, searched from newest to oldest, that:
      - is not tagged Black; and
      - contains a non-empty ActiveRetrievalBrief body.

      The semantic meaning and lifecycle of memory tags and ActiveRetrievalBrief persistence shall remain owned by the Memory Management requirements.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF-BYPASS
      6.4. No-ActiveBrief Classifier Bypass UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF-BYPASS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-OPTIONAL Optional ActiveBrief Input
      STATEMENT: When no eligible ActiveBrief exists, GHOST shall not invoke the relation-classifier LLM.

      It shall record:
      - prompt_materiality = UNKNOWN;
      - topic_relation = NO_ACTIVEBRIEF;
      - relation classifier LLM used = false.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-OPTIONAL
      6.1. Optional ActiveBrief Input UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-OPTIONAL STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROOT Preprocessing and Prompt Functions Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-ELIGIBILITY Current Eligible ActiveBrief
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF-BYPASS No-ActiveBrief Classifier Bypass
      STATEMENT: Prompt preparation shall support execution with or without a configured memory manager and with or without an eligible ActiveBrief.

      Absence of an ActiveBrief shall be a valid routing state and shall not be treated as an LLM failure.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-ELIGIBILITY
    6.2. Current Eligible ActiveBrief UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-ELIGIBILITY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-OPTIONAL Optional ActiveBrief Input
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-SNAPSHOT ActiveBrief Snapshot
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CURRENT-PROMPT Classifier Current-Prompt Projection
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-OWNERSHIP ActiveBrief Durable-Truth Boundary
    STATEMENT: When a memory manager is available, the classifier input shall use the latest eligible memory record, searched from newest to oldest, that:
    - is not tagged Black; and
    - contains a non-empty ActiveRetrievalBrief body.

    The semantic meaning and lifecycle of memory tags and ActiveRetrievalBrief persistence shall remain owned by the Memory Management requirements.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-SNAPSHOT
      6.3. ActiveBrief Snapshot UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-SNAPSHOT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-ELIGIBILITY Current Eligible ActiveBrief
      STATEMENT: The relation-classification result shall preserve a snapshot containing the selected ActiveBrief record identifier, title, and body.

      If no eligible ActiveBrief exists, the snapshot shall contain empty values rather than an invented brief.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CURRENT-PROMPT
      6.5. Classifier Current-Prompt Projection UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CURRENT-PROMPT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-ELIGIBILITY Current Eligible ActiveBrief
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-RAW-FALLBACK Classifier Raw-Text Fallback
      STATEMENT: When an eligible ActiveBrief exists, the relation classifier shall receive the normalized current prompt built from available PURPOSE, TASK, and CONTEXT values.

      The current prompt shall remain distinguishable from the ActiveBrief title and body.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-OWNERSHIP
      6.8. ActiveBrief Durable-Truth Boundary UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-OWNERSHIP STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-ELIGIBILITY Current Eligible ActiveBrief
      STATEMENT: Prompt preparation shall read the current eligible ActiveBrief for routing but shall not create, update, overwrite, persist, or become the durable owner of the ActiveRetrievalBrief.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-ELIGIBILITY
      6.2. Current Eligible ActiveBrief UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-ELIGIBILITY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-OPTIONAL Optional ActiveBrief Input
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-SNAPSHOT ActiveBrief Snapshot
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CURRENT-PROMPT Classifier Current-Prompt Projection
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-OWNERSHIP ActiveBrief Durable-Truth Boundary
      STATEMENT: When a memory manager is available, the classifier input shall use the latest eligible memory record, searched from newest to oldest, that:
      - is not tagged Black; and
      - contains a non-empty ActiveRetrievalBrief body.

      The semantic meaning and lifecycle of memory tags and ActiveRetrievalBrief persistence shall remain owned by the Memory Management requirements.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-SNAPSHOT
    6.3. ActiveBrief Snapshot UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-SNAPSHOT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-ELIGIBILITY Current Eligible ActiveBrief
    STATEMENT: The relation-classification result shall preserve a snapshot containing the selected ActiveBrief record identifier, title, and body.

    If no eligible ActiveBrief exists, the snapshot shall contain empty values rather than an invented brief.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-OPTIONAL
      6.1. Optional ActiveBrief Input UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-OPTIONAL STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROOT Preprocessing and Prompt Functions Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-ELIGIBILITY Current Eligible ActiveBrief
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF-BYPASS No-ActiveBrief Classifier Bypass
      STATEMENT: Prompt preparation shall support execution with or without a configured memory manager and with or without an eligible ActiveBrief.

      Absence of an ActiveBrief shall be a valid routing state and shall not be treated as an LLM failure.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF-BYPASS
    6.4. No-ActiveBrief Classifier Bypass UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF-BYPASS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-OPTIONAL Optional ActiveBrief Input
    STATEMENT: When no eligible ActiveBrief exists, GHOST shall not invoke the relation-classifier LLM.

    It shall record:
    - prompt_materiality = UNKNOWN;
    - topic_relation = NO_ACTIVEBRIEF;
    - relation classifier LLM used = false.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-ELIGIBILITY
      6.2. Current Eligible ActiveBrief UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-ELIGIBILITY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-OPTIONAL Optional ActiveBrief Input
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-SNAPSHOT ActiveBrief Snapshot
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CURRENT-PROMPT Classifier Current-Prompt Projection
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-OWNERSHIP ActiveBrief Durable-Truth Boundary
      STATEMENT: When a memory manager is available, the classifier input shall use the latest eligible memory record, searched from newest to oldest, that:
      - is not tagged Black; and
      - contains a non-empty ActiveRetrievalBrief body.

      The semantic meaning and lifecycle of memory tags and ActiveRetrievalBrief persistence shall remain owned by the Memory Management requirements.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CURRENT-PROMPT
    6.5. Classifier Current-Prompt Projection UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CURRENT-PROMPT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-ELIGIBILITY Current Eligible ActiveBrief
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-RAW-FALLBACK Classifier Raw-Text Fallback
    STATEMENT: When an eligible ActiveBrief exists, the relation classifier shall receive the normalized current prompt built from available PURPOSE, TASK, and CONTEXT values.

    The current prompt shall remain distinguishable from the ActiveBrief title and body.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-RAW-FALLBACK
      6.6. Classifier Raw-Text Fallback UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-RAW-FALLBACK STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CURRENT-PROMPT Classifier Current-Prompt Projection
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-EMPTY-CURRENT-BYPASS Empty Current-Prompt Bypass
      STATEMENT: If the normalized PURPOSE, TASK, and CONTEXT projection is empty, the classifier input builder may use the trimmed raw user text as the current prompt.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CURRENT-PROMPT
      6.5. Classifier Current-Prompt Projection UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CURRENT-PROMPT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-ELIGIBILITY Current Eligible ActiveBrief
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-RAW-FALLBACK Classifier Raw-Text Fallback
      STATEMENT: When an eligible ActiveBrief exists, the relation classifier shall receive the normalized current prompt built from available PURPOSE, TASK, and CONTEXT values.

      The current prompt shall remain distinguishable from the ActiveBrief title and body.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-RAW-FALLBACK
    6.6. Classifier Raw-Text Fallback UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-RAW-FALLBACK STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CURRENT-PROMPT Classifier Current-Prompt Projection
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-EMPTY-CURRENT-BYPASS Empty Current-Prompt Bypass
    STATEMENT: If the normalized PURPOSE, TASK, and CONTEXT projection is empty, the classifier input builder may use the trimmed raw user text as the current prompt.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-EMPTY-CURRENT-BYPASS
      6.7. Empty Current-Prompt Bypass UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-EMPTY-CURRENT-BYPASS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-RAW-FALLBACK Classifier Raw-Text Fallback
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-EMPTY-CURRENT AC: Empty Current Prompt with ActiveBrief
      STATEMENT: If an eligible ActiveBrief exists but the classifier current-prompt text remains empty, GHOST shall not invoke the LLM.

      It shall deterministically record:
      - prompt_materiality = WEAK;
      - topic_relation = IRRELEVANT;
      - relation classifier LLM used = false.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-RAW-FALLBACK
      6.6. Classifier Raw-Text Fallback UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-RAW-FALLBACK STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CURRENT-PROMPT Classifier Current-Prompt Projection
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-EMPTY-CURRENT-BYPASS Empty Current-Prompt Bypass
      STATEMENT: If the normalized PURPOSE, TASK, and CONTEXT projection is empty, the classifier input builder may use the trimmed raw user text as the current prompt.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-EMPTY-CURRENT-BYPASS
    6.7. Empty Current-Prompt Bypass UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-EMPTY-CURRENT-BYPASS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-RAW-FALLBACK Classifier Raw-Text Fallback
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-EMPTY-CURRENT AC: Empty Current Prompt with ActiveBrief
    STATEMENT: If an eligible ActiveBrief exists but the classifier current-prompt text remains empty, GHOST shall not invoke the LLM.

    It shall deterministically record:
    - prompt_materiality = WEAK;
    - topic_relation = IRRELEVANT;
    - relation classifier LLM used = false.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-EMPTY-CURRENT
      12.13. AC: Empty Current Prompt with ActiveBrief UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-EMPTY-CURRENT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-EMPTY-CURRENT-BYPASS Empty Current-Prompt Bypass
      STATEMENT: Given an eligible ActiveBrief but no usable current-prompt text, relation classification shall not call the LLM and shall write WEAK + IRRELEVANT with memory context disabled and final_prompt_mode none.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-ELIGIBILITY
      6.2. Current Eligible ActiveBrief UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-ELIGIBILITY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-OPTIONAL Optional ActiveBrief Input
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-SNAPSHOT ActiveBrief Snapshot
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CURRENT-PROMPT Classifier Current-Prompt Projection
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-OWNERSHIP ActiveBrief Durable-Truth Boundary
      STATEMENT: When a memory manager is available, the classifier input shall use the latest eligible memory record, searched from newest to oldest, that:
      - is not tagged Black; and
      - contains a non-empty ActiveRetrievalBrief body.

      The semantic meaning and lifecycle of memory tags and ActiveRetrievalBrief persistence shall remain owned by the Memory Management requirements.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-OWNERSHIP
    6.8. ActiveBrief Durable-Truth Boundary UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-OWNERSHIP STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-ELIGIBILITY Current Eligible ActiveBrief
    STATEMENT: Prompt preparation shall read the current eligible ActiveBrief for routing but shall not create, update, overwrite, persist, or become the durable owner of the ActiveRetrievalBrief.

    7. 7. ActiveBrief Relation Classification and Deterministic Routing
    The relation classifier produces two independent labels. Deterministic policy maps their combination into retrieval-query behavior, final-prompt continuity behavior, and memory-context permission.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROOT
      1.1. Preprocessing and Prompt Functions Scope UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROOT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SRS-FILE-TREE Requirement File Tree Parent Anchor
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-PRODUCT-NAME Product and Package Naming Boundary
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-THREE-PART-MODEL Three-Part Prompt-Preparation Model
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CURRENT-SCOPE Current Executable Scope
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-END-TO-END-FLOW Raw-Input-to-Retrieval-Handoff Flow
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-SCHEMA-LOAD Prompt Schema Loading
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-NONEMPTY-INPUT Non-Empty Raw Input Processing
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-IN-PLACE-UPDATE In-Place SuperPrompt Update
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ACTIVEBRIEF-OPTIONAL Optional ActiveBrief Input
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION Two Independent Classification Dimensions
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-A2-INPUT-STATE A2 Input State
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-QUERY-FINALIZATION Post-Classification Retrieval-Query Finalization
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-SCHEMA-ERROR Prompt Schema Failure
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-ERROR Relation Classifier Failure Integrity
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-A2-ERROR A2 Failure Integrity
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-NO-UNNECESSARY-CLASSIFIER-CALL No Unnecessary Relation-Classifier Call
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-LOGGING-BOUNDARY Prompt Preparation Logging Boundary
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DETERMINISTIC-REPRODUCIBILITY Deterministic Reproducibility
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TESTABILITY Prompt Function Testability
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-NO-HIDDEN-HEURISTICS No Hidden Prompt Heuristics
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CODE-TRACE-ANCHORS Prompt Function Code Trace Anchors
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-SIBLING-OWNERSHIP Sibling Requirement Ownership
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CURRENT-FUTURE-BOUNDARY Current and Future Prompt-Function Boundary
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall provide one prompt-preparation capability that transforms raw user input into a structured and routed SuperPrompt ready for downstream Knowledge Management and Memory Management processing.

      The capability shall include deterministic preprocessing, ActiveBrief relation classification, deterministic routing decisions, A2 PromptShaper execution, synchronized retrieval-query construction, and final prompt-preview projection.

      The capability shall stop at the handoff boundary and shall not execute document retrieval, memory retrieval, document reranking, evidence selection, evidence condensation, or memory-context synthesis.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION
    7.1. Two Independent Classification Dimensions UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROOT Preprocessing and Prompt Functions Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-MATERIALITY-CONTRACT Prompt Materiality Contract
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-RELATION-CONTRACT Topic Relation Contract
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFICATION-ORDER Classification Decision Order
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CONFIG Configured Relation Classifier
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-RELATION-STATE Combined Relation State
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
    STATEMENT: The relation classifier shall return exactly two semantic decisions:
    - prompt_materiality; and
    - topic_relation.

    The classifier shall not collapse both dimensions into one combined LLM label.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-MATERIALITY-CONTRACT
      7.2. Prompt Materiality Contract UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-MATERIALITY-CONTRACT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION Two Independent Classification Dimensions
      STATEMENT: Prompt materiality shall be classified from the current prompt alone.

      Allowed values shall be:
      - STRONG: the current prompt independently identifies a task, topic, or information need;
      - WEAK: the current prompt depends mainly on previous conversational context.

      Relation to the ActiveBrief shall not by itself make a prompt STRONG.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-RELATION-CONTRACT
      7.3. Topic Relation Contract UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-RELATION-CONTRACT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION Two Independent Classification Dimensions
      STATEMENT: Topic relation shall be classified using both the current prompt and the ActiveBrief.

      Allowed values shall be:
      - SAME_TOPIC: direct continuation or clear reference to the current ActiveBrief topic;
      - RELATED_DOMAIN: a different immediate topic within the same broader professional or technical domain;
      - IRRELEVANT: another domain or no useful contextual bridge.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFICATION-ORDER
      7.4. Classification Decision Order UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFICATION-ORDER STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION Two Independent Classification Dimensions
      STATEMENT: The classifier instruction shall require prompt materiality to be decided first from the current prompt alone and topic relation to be decided second using the current prompt and ActiveBrief.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CONFIG
      7.5. Configured Relation Classifier UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CONFIG STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION Two Independent Classification Dimensions
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-STRUCTURED-OUTPUT Exact Classifier Output
      STATEMENT: The current relation classifier shall be represented by a versioned Agent Stack configuration defining:
      - classifier identity;
      - model settings;
      - static classifier rules;
      - ActiveBrief and current-prompt bindings;
      - the two decision targets; and
      - the structured output mapping.

      The functional behavior in this file shall remain independent of the physical JSON path.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-RELATION-STATE
      7.8. Combined Relation State UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-RELATION-STATE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION Two Independent Classification Dimensions
      STATEMENT: For an eligible ActiveBrief, GHOST shall derive a combined relation-state identifier from prompt_materiality and topic_relation.

      For absence of an ActiveBrief, the relation state shall be NO_ACTIVEBRIEF.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT
      7.9. Deterministic Routing Decision Contract UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION Two Independent Classification Dimensions
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF Routing State: No ActiveBrief
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-SAME Routing State: Strong and Same Topic
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-SAME Routing State: Weak and Same Topic
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-RELATED Routing State: Strong and Related Domain
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-RELATED Routing State: Weak and Related Domain
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-IRRELEVANT Routing State: Strong and Irrelevant
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-IRRELEVANT Routing State: Weak and Irrelevant
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-FINAL-MODE-AUTHORITY Final Prompt Mode Authority
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-MEMORY-POLICY-AUTHORITY Memory Context Permission Authority
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROUTING-EXTRAS Relation and Routing Metadata in SuperPrompt
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROUTING-LOG Public Relation Summary
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-SIX-STATE-MATRIX AC: Six-State Deterministic Routing Matrix
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall deterministically derive one routing decision containing:
      - prompt_materiality;
      - topic_relation;
      - use_activebrief_for_retrieval;
      - final_prompt_mode;
      - allow_memory_context; and
      - memory_context_policy.

      The LLM shall not populate these action fields directly.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION
      7.1. Two Independent Classification Dimensions UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROOT Preprocessing and Prompt Functions Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-MATERIALITY-CONTRACT Prompt Materiality Contract
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-RELATION-CONTRACT Topic Relation Contract
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFICATION-ORDER Classification Decision Order
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CONFIG Configured Relation Classifier
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-RELATION-STATE Combined Relation State
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
      STATEMENT: The relation classifier shall return exactly two semantic decisions:
      - prompt_materiality; and
      - topic_relation.

      The classifier shall not collapse both dimensions into one combined LLM label.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-MATERIALITY-CONTRACT
    7.2. Prompt Materiality Contract UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-MATERIALITY-CONTRACT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION Two Independent Classification Dimensions
    STATEMENT: Prompt materiality shall be classified from the current prompt alone.

    Allowed values shall be:
    - STRONG: the current prompt independently identifies a task, topic, or information need;
    - WEAK: the current prompt depends mainly on previous conversational context.

    Relation to the ActiveBrief shall not by itself make a prompt STRONG.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION
      7.1. Two Independent Classification Dimensions UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):

      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-MATERIALITY-CONTRACT Prompt Materiality Contract
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-RELATION-CONTRACT Topic Relation Contract
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFICATION-ORDER Classification Decision Order
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CONFIG Configured Relation Classifier
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-RELATION-STATE Combined Relation State
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
      STATEMENT: The relation classifier shall return exactly two semantic decisions:
      - prompt_materiality; and
      - topic_relation.

      The classifier shall not collapse both dimensions into one combined LLM label.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-RELATION-CONTRACT
    7.3. Topic Relation Contract UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-RELATION-CONTRACT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION Two Independent Classification Dimensions
    STATEMENT: Topic relation shall be classified using both the current prompt and the ActiveBrief.

    Allowed values shall be:
    - SAME_TOPIC: direct continuation or clear reference to the current ActiveBrief topic;
    - RELATED_DOMAIN: a different immediate topic within the same broader professional or technical domain;
    - IRRELEVANT: another domain or no useful contextual bridge.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION
      7.1. Two Independent Classification Dimensions UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROOT Preprocessing and Prompt Functions Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-MATERIALITY-CONTRACT Prompt Materiality Contract
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-RELATION-CONTRACT Topic Relation Contract
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFICATION-ORDER Classification Decision Order
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CONFIG Configured Relation Classifier
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-RELATION-STATE Combined Relation State
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
      STATEMENT: The relation classifier shall return exactly two semantic decisions:
      - prompt_materiality; and
      - topic_relation.

      The classifier shall not collapse both dimensions into one combined LLM label.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFICATION-ORDER
    7.4. Classification Decision Order UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFICATION-ORDER STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION Two Independent Classification Dimensions
    STATEMENT: The classifier instruction shall require prompt materiality to be decided first from the current prompt alone and topic relation to be decided second using the current prompt and ActiveBrief.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION
      7.1. Two Independent Classification Dimensions UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROOT Preprocessing and Prompt Functions Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-MATERIALITY-CONTRACT Prompt Materiality Contract
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-RELATION-CONTRACT Topic Relation Contract
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFICATION-ORDER Classification Decision Order
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CONFIG Configured Relation Classifier
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-RELATION-STATE Combined Relation State
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
      STATEMENT: The relation classifier shall return exactly two semantic decisions:
      - prompt_materiality; and
      - topic_relation.

      The classifier shall not collapse both dimensions into one combined LLM label.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CONFIG
    7.5. Configured Relation Classifier UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CONFIG STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION Two Independent Classification Dimensions
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-STRUCTURED-OUTPUT Exact Classifier Output
    STATEMENT: The current relation classifier shall be represented by a versioned Agent Stack configuration defining:
    - classifier identity;
    - model settings;
    - static classifier rules;
    - ActiveBrief and current-prompt bindings;
    - the two decision targets; and
    - the structured output mapping.

    The functional behavior in this file shall remain independent of the physical JSON path.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-STRUCTURED-OUTPUT
      7.6. Exact Classifier Output UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-STRUCTURED-OUTPUT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CONFIG Configured Relation Classifier
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-VALIDATION Classifier Result Validation
      STATEMENT: The relation-classifier LLM shall return one JSON object containing exactly:
      - prompt_materiality; and
      - topic_relation.

      It shall not return action decisions, explanations, prose, or additional keys as part of the required output contract.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CONFIG
      7.5. Configured Relation Classifier UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CONFIG STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION Two Independent Classification Dimensions
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-STRUCTURED-OUTPUT Exact Classifier Output
      STATEMENT: The current relation classifier shall be represented by a versioned Agent Stack configuration defining:
      - classifier identity;
      - model settings;
      - static classifier rules;
      - ActiveBrief and current-prompt bindings;
      - the two decision targets; and
      - the structured output mapping.

      The functional behavior in this file shall remain independent of the physical JSON path.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-STRUCTURED-OUTPUT
    7.6. Exact Classifier Output UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-STRUCTURED-OUTPUT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CONFIG Configured Relation Classifier
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-VALIDATION Classifier Result Validation
    STATEMENT: The relation-classifier LLM shall return one JSON object containing exactly:
    - prompt_materiality; and
    - topic_relation.

    It shall not return action decisions, explanations, prose, or additional keys as part of the required output contract.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-VALIDATION
      7.7. Classifier Result Validation UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-VALIDATION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-STRUCTURED-OUTPUT Exact Classifier Output
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-CLASSIFIER-VALUES AC: Exact Relation Classifier Values
      STATEMENT: After AgentPrompt parsing, GHOST shall validate that prompt_materiality and topic_relation belong to their exact allowed value sets.

      An invalid or unknown value shall fail explicitly and shall not be converted into a fabricated valid routing state.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-STRUCTURED-OUTPUT
      7.6. Exact Classifier Output UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-STRUCTURED-OUTPUT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CONFIG Configured Relation Classifier
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-VALIDATION Classifier Result Validation
      STATEMENT: The relation-classifier LLM shall return one JSON object containing exactly:
      - prompt_materiality; and
      - topic_relation.

      It shall not return action decisions, explanations, prose, or additional keys as part of the required output contract.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-VALIDATION
    7.7. Classifier Result Validation UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-VALIDATION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-STRUCTURED-OUTPUT Exact Classifier Output
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-CLASSIFIER-VALUES AC: Exact Relation Classifier Values
    STATEMENT: After AgentPrompt parsing, GHOST shall validate that prompt_materiality and topic_relation belong to their exact allowed value sets.

    An invalid or unknown value shall fail explicitly and shall not be converted into a fabricated valid routing state.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-CLASSIFIER-VALUES
      12.14. AC: Exact Relation Classifier Values UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-CLASSIFIER-VALUES STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-VALIDATION Classifier Result Validation
      STATEMENT: Given a normal relation-classifier call, the accepted parsed result shall contain one allowed prompt_materiality value and one allowed topic_relation value.

      Any other value shall fail explicitly before routing action fields are written as a valid decision.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION
      7.1. Two Independent Classification Dimensions UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROOT Preprocessing and Prompt Functions Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-MATERIALITY-CONTRACT Prompt Materiality Contract
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-RELATION-CONTRACT Topic Relation Contract
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFICATION-ORDER Classification Decision Order
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CONFIG Configured Relation Classifier
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-RELATION-STATE Combined Relation State
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
      STATEMENT: The relation classifier shall return exactly two semantic decisions:
      - prompt_materiality; and
      - topic_relation.

      The classifier shall not collapse both dimensions into one combined LLM label.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-RELATION-STATE
    7.8. Combined Relation State UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-RELATION-STATE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION Two Independent Classification Dimensions
    STATEMENT: For an eligible ActiveBrief, GHOST shall derive a combined relation-state identifier from prompt_materiality and topic_relation.

    For absence of an ActiveBrief, the relation state shall be NO_ACTIVEBRIEF.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION
      7.1. Two Independent Classification Dimensions UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROOT Preprocessing and Prompt Functions Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-MATERIALITY-CONTRACT Prompt Materiality Contract
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-RELATION-CONTRACT Topic Relation Contract
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFICATION-ORDER Classification Decision Order
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-CLASSIFIER-CONFIG Configured Relation Classifier
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-RELATION-STATE Combined Relation State
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
      STATEMENT: The relation classifier shall return exactly two semantic decisions:
      - prompt_materiality; and
      - topic_relation.

      The classifier shall not collapse both dimensions into one combined LLM label.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT
    7.9. Deterministic Routing Decision Contract UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION Two Independent Classification Dimensions
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF Routing State: No ActiveBrief
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-SAME Routing State: Strong and Same Topic
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-SAME Routing State: Weak and Same Topic
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-RELATED Routing State: Strong and Related Domain
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-RELATED Routing State: Weak and Related Domain
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-IRRELEVANT Routing State: Strong and Irrelevant
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-IRRELEVANT Routing State: Weak and Irrelevant
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-FINAL-MODE-AUTHORITY Final Prompt Mode Authority
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-MEMORY-POLICY-AUTHORITY Memory Context Permission Authority
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROUTING-EXTRAS Relation and Routing Metadata in SuperPrompt
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROUTING-LOG Public Relation Summary
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-SIX-STATE-MATRIX AC: Six-State Deterministic Routing Matrix
    STATEMENT: GHOST shall deterministically derive one routing decision containing:
    - prompt_materiality;
    - topic_relation;
    - use_activebrief_for_retrieval;
    - final_prompt_mode;
    - allow_memory_context; and
    - memory_context_policy.

    The LLM shall not populate these action fields directly.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF
      7.10. Routing State: No ActiveBrief UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF AC: No ActiveBrief State
      STATEMENT: For NO_ACTIVEBRIEF, GHOST shall set:
      - use_activebrief_for_retrieval = false;
      - final_prompt_mode = none;
      - allow_memory_context = true;
      - memory_context_policy = normal_no_activebrief.

      The effective document query shall use the current prompt only.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-SAME
      7.11. Routing State: Strong and Same Topic UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-SAME STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
      STATEMENT: For STRONG + SAME_TOPIC, GHOST shall set:
      - use_activebrief_for_retrieval = false;
      - final_prompt_mode = full_activebrief;
      - allow_memory_context = true;
      - memory_context_policy = allowed.

      The effective document query shall use the current prompt without adding the ActiveBrief.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-SAME
      7.12. Routing State: Weak and Same Topic UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-SAME STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-WEAK-SAME-QUERY AC: Weak Same-Topic Retrieval Query
      STATEMENT: For WEAK + SAME_TOPIC, GHOST shall set:
      - use_activebrief_for_retrieval = true;
      - final_prompt_mode = full_activebrief;
      - allow_memory_context = true;
      - memory_context_policy = allowed.

      The effective document query shall contain the current prompt and the full ActiveBrief body.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-RELATED
      7.13. Routing State: Strong and Related Domain UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-RELATED STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
      STATEMENT: For STRONG + RELATED_DOMAIN, GHOST shall set:
      - use_activebrief_for_retrieval = false;
      - final_prompt_mode = title_related_domain_note;
      - allow_memory_context = true;
      - memory_context_policy = allowed_related_domain.

      The effective document query shall use the current prompt without adding the ActiveBrief.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-RELATED
      7.14. Routing State: Weak and Related Domain UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-RELATED STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-WEAK-RELATED-QUERY AC: Weak Related-Domain Retrieval Query
      STATEMENT: For WEAK + RELATED_DOMAIN, GHOST shall set:
      - use_activebrief_for_retrieval = true;
      - final_prompt_mode = title_related_domain_note;
      - allow_memory_context = true;
      - memory_context_policy = allowed_related_domain.

      The effective document query shall contain the current prompt and the ActiveBrief title, but not the full ActiveBrief body.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-IRRELEVANT
      7.15. Routing State: Strong and Irrelevant UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-IRRELEVANT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
      STATEMENT: For STRONG + IRRELEVANT, GHOST shall set:
      - use_activebrief_for_retrieval = false;
      - final_prompt_mode = title_topic_shift_note;
      - allow_memory_context = false;
      - memory_context_policy = disabled.

      The effective document query shall use the current prompt without adding the ActiveBrief.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-IRRELEVANT
      7.16. Routing State: Weak and Irrelevant UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-IRRELEVANT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-WEAK-IRRELEVANT-QUERY AC: Weak Irrelevant Retrieval Suppression
      STATEMENT: For WEAK + IRRELEVANT, GHOST shall set:
      - use_activebrief_for_retrieval = false;
      - final_prompt_mode = none;
      - allow_memory_context = false;
      - memory_context_policy = disabled.

      The effective document-retrieval query shall be empty, signaling that document retrieval is not applicable for this state.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-FINAL-MODE-AUTHORITY
      7.17. Final Prompt Mode Authority UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-FINAL-MODE-AUTHORITY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-FINAL-MODE AC: Final Prompt Mode Projection
      STATEMENT: Central prompt projection shall honor the deterministic final_prompt_mode stored by prompt preparation.

      The projector shall not independently derive an ActiveBrief inclusion behavior that contradicts the routing decision.

      The supported current modes shall mean:
      - full_activebrief: include title and full brief as supporting continuity context;
      - title_related_domain_note: include the title with related-domain continuity framing;
      - title_topic_shift_note: include the title only for explicit topic-shift awareness;
      - none: include no ActiveBrief content.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-MEMORY-POLICY-AUTHORITY
      7.18. Memory Context Permission Authority UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-MEMORY-POLICY-AUTHORITY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
      STATEMENT: Downstream Memory Management shall honor allow_memory_context and memory_context_policy from the deterministic routing decision.

      A disabled memory-context state shall not be overridden by generic memory retrieval merely because memory data is available.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROUTING-EXTRAS
      7.19. Relation and Routing Metadata in SuperPrompt UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROUTING-EXTRAS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
      STATEMENT: Prompt preparation shall expose the relation-classification and routing result through stable SuperPrompt extras sufficient for downstream traceability.

      The current contract shall include:
      - activebrief_prompt_materiality;
      - activebrief_topic_relation;
      - activebrief_relation_state;
      - activebrief_relation_llm_used;
      - activebrief_relation_decision;
      - activebrief_relation_activebrief.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROUTING-LOG
      7.20. Public Relation Summary UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROUTING-LOG STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
      STATEMENT: Prompt preparation shall emit a compact user-visible summary of the current topic relation and prompt strength after the routing result is written.

      Detailed prompts, ActiveBrief bodies, or raw model output shall not be exposed through the public log solely to explain the classification.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-SIX-STATE-MATRIX
      12.15. AC: Six-State Deterministic Routing Matrix UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-SIX-STATE-MATRIX STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
      STATEMENT: Given each valid STRONG/WEAK and SAME_TOPIC/RELATED_DOMAIN/IRRELEVANT combination, GHOST shall produce exactly the routing values defined in the corresponding state requirement.

      The same classification pair shall always produce the same routing decision.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT
      7.9. Deterministic Routing Decision Contract UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION Two Independent Classification Dimensions
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF Routing State: No ActiveBrief
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-SAME Routing State: Strong and Same Topic
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-SAME Routing State: Weak and Same Topic
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-RELATED Routing State: Strong and Related Domain
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-RELATED Routing State: Weak and Related Domain
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-IRRELEVANT Routing State: Strong and Irrelevant
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-IRRELEVANT Routing State: Weak and Irrelevant
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-FINAL-MODE-AUTHORITY Final Prompt Mode Authority
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-MEMORY-POLICY-AUTHORITY Memory Context Permission Authority
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROUTING-EXTRAS Relation and Routing Metadata in SuperPrompt
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROUTING-LOG Public Relation Summary
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-SIX-STATE-MATRIX AC: Six-State Deterministic Routing Matrix
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall deterministically derive one routing decision containing:
      - prompt_materiality;
      - topic_relation;
      - use_activebrief_for_retrieval;
      - final_prompt_mode;
      - allow_memory_context; and
      - memory_context_policy.

      The LLM shall not populate these action fields directly.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF
    7.10. Routing State: No ActiveBrief UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF AC: No ActiveBrief State
    STATEMENT: For NO_ACTIVEBRIEF, GHOST shall set:
    - use_activebrief_for_retrieval = false;
    - final_prompt_mode = none;
    - allow_memory_context = true;
    - memory_context_policy = normal_no_activebrief.

    The effective document query shall use the current prompt only.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF
      12.12. AC: No ActiveBrief State UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF Routing State: No ActiveBrief
      STATEMENT: Given no eligible ActiveBrief, relation classification shall not call the LLM and shall write UNKNOWN, NO_ACTIVEBRIEF, an empty ActiveBrief snapshot, and the normal_no_activebrief routing decision.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT
      7.9. Deterministic Routing Decision Contract UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION Two Independent Classification Dimensions
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF Routing State: No ActiveBrief
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-SAME Routing State: Strong and Same Topic
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-SAME Routing State: Weak and Same Topic
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-RELATED Routing State: Strong and Related Domain
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-RELATED Routing State: Weak and Related Domain
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-IRRELEVANT Routing State: Strong and Irrelevant
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-IRRELEVANT Routing State: Weak and Irrelevant
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-FINAL-MODE-AUTHORITY Final Prompt Mode Authority
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-MEMORY-POLICY-AUTHORITY Memory Context Permission Authority
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROUTING-EXTRAS Relation and Routing Metadata in SuperPrompt
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROUTING-LOG Public Relation Summary
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-SIX-STATE-MATRIX AC: Six-State Deterministic Routing Matrix
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall deterministically derive one routing decision containing:
      - prompt_materiality;
      - topic_relation;
      - use_activebrief_for_retrieval;
      - final_prompt_mode;
      - allow_memory_context; and
      - memory_context_policy.

      The LLM shall not populate these action fields directly.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-SAME
    7.11. Routing State: Strong and Same Topic UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-SAME STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
    STATEMENT: For STRONG + SAME_TOPIC, GHOST shall set:
    - use_activebrief_for_retrieval = false;
    - final_prompt_mode = full_activebrief;
    - allow_memory_context = true;
    - memory_context_policy = allowed.

    The effective document query shall use the current prompt without adding the ActiveBrief.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT
      7.9. Deterministic Routing Decision Contract UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):

      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-RELATED Routing State: Weak and Related Domain
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-IRRELEVANT Routing State: Strong and Irrelevant
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-IRRELEVANT Routing State: Weak and Irrelevant

      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-MEMORY-POLICY-AUTHORITY Memory Context Permission Authority

    GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-SAME
    7.12. Routing State: Weak and Same Topic UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-SAME STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-WEAK-SAME-QUERY AC: Weak Same-Topic Retrieval Query
    STATEMENT: For WEAK + SAME_TOPIC, GHOST shall set:
    - use_activebrief_for_retrieval = true;
    - final_prompt_mode = full_activebrief;
    - allow_memory_context = true;
    - memory_context_policy = allowed.

    The effective document query shall contain the current prompt and the full ActiveBrief body.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-WEAK-SAME-QUERY
      12.16. AC: Weak Same-Topic Retrieval Query UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-WEAK-SAME-QUERY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-SAME Routing State: Weak and Same Topic
      STATEMENT: Given WEAK + SAME_TOPIC and a non-empty ActiveBrief body, the finalized effective retrieval query shall include the current TASK/PURPOSE/CONTEXT projection and the full ActiveBrief body.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT
      7.9. Deterministic Routing Decision Contract UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION Two Independent Classification Dimensions

      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-RELATED Routing State: Weak and Related Domain

      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-IRRELEVANT Routing State: Weak and Irrelevant

      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-MEMORY-POLICY-AUTHORITY Memory Context Permission Authority

      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-SIX-STATE-MATRIX AC: Six-State Deterministic Routing Matrix
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall deterministically derive one routing decision containing:
      - prompt_materiality;
      - topic_relation;
      - use_activebrief_for_retrieval;
      - final_prompt_mode;
      - allow_memory_context; and
      - memory_context_policy.

      The LLM shall not populate these action fields directly.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-RELATED
    7.13. Routing State: Strong and Related Domain UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-RELATED STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
    STATEMENT: For STRONG + RELATED_DOMAIN, GHOST shall set:
    - use_activebrief_for_retrieval = false;
    - final_prompt_mode = title_related_domain_note;
    - allow_memory_context = true;
    - memory_context_policy = allowed_related_domain.

    The effective document query shall use the current prompt without adding the ActiveBrief.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT
      7.9. Deterministic Routing Decision Contract UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION Two Independent Classification Dimensions
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF Routing State: No ActiveBrief
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-SAME Routing State: Strong and Same Topic
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-SAME Routing State: Weak and Same Topic
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-RELATED Routing State: Strong and Related Domain
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-RELATED Routing State: Weak and Related Domain
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-IRRELEVANT Routing State: Strong and Irrelevant
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-IRRELEVANT Routing State: Weak and Irrelevant
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-FINAL-MODE-AUTHORITY Final Prompt Mode Authority
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-MEMORY-POLICY-AUTHORITY Memory Context Permission Authority
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROUTING-EXTRAS Relation and Routing Metadata in SuperPrompt
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROUTING-LOG Public Relation Summary
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-SIX-STATE-MATRIX AC: Six-State Deterministic Routing Matrix
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall deterministically derive one routing decision containing:
      - prompt_materiality;
      - topic_relation;
      - use_activebrief_for_retrieval;
      - final_prompt_mode;
      - allow_memory_context; and
      - memory_context_policy.

      The LLM shall not populate these action fields directly.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-RELATED
    7.14. Routing State: Weak and Related Domain UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-RELATED STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-WEAK-RELATED-QUERY AC: Weak Related-Domain Retrieval Query
    STATEMENT: For WEAK + RELATED_DOMAIN, GHOST shall set:
    - use_activebrief_for_retrieval = true;
    - final_prompt_mode = title_related_domain_note;
    - allow_memory_context = true;
    - memory_context_policy = allowed_related_domain.

    The effective document query shall contain the current prompt and the ActiveBrief title, but not the full ActiveBrief body.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-WEAK-RELATED-QUERY
      12.17. AC: Weak Related-Domain Retrieval Query UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-WEAK-RELATED-QUERY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-RELATED Routing State: Weak and Related Domain
      STATEMENT: Given WEAK + RELATED_DOMAIN and a non-empty ActiveBrief title, the finalized effective retrieval query shall include the current TASK/PURPOSE/CONTEXT projection and the ActiveBrief title without the full ActiveBrief body.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT
      7.9. Deterministic Routing Decision Contract UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION Two Independent Classification Dimensions
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF Routing State: No ActiveBrief
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-SAME Routing State: Strong and Same Topic
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-SAME Routing State: Weak and Same Topic
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-RELATED Routing State: Strong and Related Domain
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-RELATED Routing State: Weak and Related Domain
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-IRRELEVANT Routing State: Strong and Irrelevant
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-IRRELEVANT Routing State: Weak and Irrelevant
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-FINAL-MODE-AUTHORITY Final Prompt Mode Authority
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-MEMORY-POLICY-AUTHORITY Memory Context Permission Authority
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROUTING-EXTRAS Relation and Routing Metadata in SuperPrompt
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROUTING-LOG Public Relation Summary
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-SIX-STATE-MATRIX AC: Six-State Deterministic Routing Matrix
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall deterministically derive one routing decision containing:
      - prompt_materiality;
      - topic_relation;
      - use_activebrief_for_retrieval;
      - final_prompt_mode;
      - allow_memory_context; and
      - memory_context_policy.

      The LLM shall not populate these action fields directly.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-IRRELEVANT
    7.15. Routing State: Strong and Irrelevant UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-IRRELEVANT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
    STATEMENT: For STRONG + IRRELEVANT, GHOST shall set:
    - use_activebrief_for_retrieval = false;
    - final_prompt_mode = title_topic_shift_note;
    - allow_memory_context = false;
    - memory_context_policy = disabled.

    The effective document query shall use the current prompt without adding the ActiveBrief.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT
      7.9. Deterministic Routing Decision Contract UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION Two Independent Classification Dimensions
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF Routing State: No ActiveBrief
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-SAME Routing State: Strong and Same Topic
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-SAME Routing State: Weak and Same Topic
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-RELATED Routing State: Strong and Related Domain
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-RELATED Routing State: Weak and Related Domain
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-IRRELEVANT Routing State: Strong and Irrelevant
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-IRRELEVANT Routing State: Weak and Irrelevant
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-FINAL-MODE-AUTHORITY Final Prompt Mode Authority
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-MEMORY-POLICY-AUTHORITY Memory Context Permission Authority
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROUTING-EXTRAS Relation and Routing Metadata in SuperPrompt
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROUTING-LOG Public Relation Summary
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-SIX-STATE-MATRIX AC: Six-State Deterministic Routing Matrix
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall deterministically derive one routing decision containing:
      - prompt_materiality;
      - topic_relation;
      - use_activebrief_for_retrieval;
      - final_prompt_mode;
      - allow_memory_context; and
      - memory_context_policy.

      The LLM shall not populate these action fields directly.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-IRRELEVANT
    7.16. Routing State: Weak and Irrelevant UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-IRRELEVANT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-WEAK-IRRELEVANT-QUERY AC: Weak Irrelevant Retrieval Suppression
    STATEMENT: For WEAK + IRRELEVANT, GHOST shall set:
    - use_activebrief_for_retrieval = false;
    - final_prompt_mode = none;
    - allow_memory_context = false;
    - memory_context_policy = disabled.

    The effective document-retrieval query shall be empty, signaling that document retrieval is not applicable for this state.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-WEAK-IRRELEVANT-QUERY
      12.18. AC: Weak Irrelevant Retrieval Suppression UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-WEAK-IRRELEVANT-QUERY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-IRRELEVANT Routing State: Weak and Irrelevant
      STATEMENT: Given WEAK + IRRELEVANT, the finalized effective document-retrieval query shall be empty and memory context shall be disabled.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT
      7.9. Deterministic Routing Decision Contract UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION Two Independent Classification Dimensions
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF Routing State: No ActiveBrief
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-SAME Routing State: Strong and Same Topic
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-SAME Routing State: Weak and Same Topic
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-RELATED Routing State: Strong and Related Domain
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-RELATED Routing State: Weak and Related Domain
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-IRRELEVANT Routing State: Strong and Irrelevant
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-IRRELEVANT Routing State: Weak and Irrelevant
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-FINAL-MODE-AUTHORITY Final Prompt Mode Authority
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-MEMORY-POLICY-AUTHORITY Memory Context Permission Authority
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROUTING-EXTRAS Relation and Routing Metadata in SuperPrompt
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROUTING-LOG Public Relation Summary
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-SIX-STATE-MATRIX AC: Six-State Deterministic Routing Matrix
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall deterministically derive one routing decision containing:
      - prompt_materiality;
      - topic_relation;
      - use_activebrief_for_retrieval;
      - final_prompt_mode;
      - allow_memory_context; and
      - memory_context_policy.

      The LLM shall not populate these action fields directly.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-FINAL-MODE-AUTHORITY
    7.17. Final Prompt Mode Authority UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-FINAL-MODE-AUTHORITY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-FINAL-MODE AC: Final Prompt Mode Projection
    STATEMENT: Central prompt projection shall honor the deterministic final_prompt_mode stored by prompt preparation.

    The projector shall not independently derive an ActiveBrief inclusion behavior that contradicts the routing decision.

    The supported current modes shall mean:
    - full_activebrief: include title and full brief as supporting continuity context;
    - title_related_domain_note: include the title with related-domain continuity framing;
    - title_topic_shift_note: include the title only for explicit topic-shift awareness;
    - none: include no ActiveBrief content.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-FINAL-MODE
      12.20. AC: Final Prompt Mode Projection UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-FINAL-MODE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-FINAL-MODE-AUTHORITY Final Prompt Mode Authority
      STATEMENT: Given a deterministic final_prompt_mode, the central projector shall include exactly the permitted ActiveBrief continuity material for that mode and shall not independently apply a contradictory state table.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT
      7.9. Deterministic Routing Decision Contract UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION Two Independent Classification Dimensions
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF Routing State: No ActiveBrief
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-SAME Routing State: Strong and Same Topic
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-SAME Routing State: Weak and Same Topic
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-RELATED Routing State: Strong and Related Domain
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-RELATED Routing State: Weak and Related Domain
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-IRRELEVANT Routing State: Strong and Irrelevant
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-IRRELEVANT Routing State: Weak and Irrelevant
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-FINAL-MODE-AUTHORITY Final Prompt Mode Authority
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-MEMORY-POLICY-AUTHORITY Memory Context Permission Authority
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROUTING-EXTRAS Relation and Routing Metadata in SuperPrompt
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROUTING-LOG Public Relation Summary
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-SIX-STATE-MATRIX AC: Six-State Deterministic Routing Matrix
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall deterministically derive one routing decision containing:
      - prompt_materiality;
      - topic_relation;
      - use_activebrief_for_retrieval;
      - final_prompt_mode;
      - allow_memory_context; and
      - memory_context_policy.

      The LLM shall not populate these action fields directly.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-MEMORY-POLICY-AUTHORITY
    7.18. Memory Context Permission Authority UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-MEMORY-POLICY-AUTHORITY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
    STATEMENT: Downstream Memory Management shall honor allow_memory_context and memory_context_policy from the deterministic routing decision.

    A disabled memory-context state shall not be overridden by generic memory retrieval merely because memory data is available.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT
      7.9. Deterministic Routing Decision Contract UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION Two Independent Classification Dimensions
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF Routing State: No ActiveBrief
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-SAME Routing State: Strong and Same Topic
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-SAME Routing State: Weak and Same Topic
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-RELATED Routing State: Strong and Related Domain
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-RELATED Routing State: Weak and Related Domain
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-IRRELEVANT Routing State: Strong and Irrelevant
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-IRRELEVANT Routing State: Weak and Irrelevant
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-FINAL-MODE-AUTHORITY Final Prompt Mode Authority
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-MEMORY-POLICY-AUTHORITY Memory Context Permission Authority
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROUTING-EXTRAS Relation and Routing Metadata in SuperPrompt

      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-AC-SIX-STATE-MATRIX AC: Six-State Deterministic Routing Matrix
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall deterministically derive one routing decision containing:
      - prompt_materiality;
      - topic_relation;
      - use_activebrief_for_retrieval;
      - final_prompt_mode;
      - allow_memory_context; and
      - memory_context_policy.

      The LLM shall not populate these action fields directly.
    GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROUTING-EXTRAS
    7.19. Relation and Routing Metadata in SuperPrompt UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROUTING-EXTRAS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT Deterministic Routing Decision Contract
    STATEMENT: Prompt preparation shall expose the relation-classification and routing result through stable SuperPrompt extras sufficient for downstream traceability.

    The current contract shall include:
    - activebrief_prompt_materiality;
    - activebrief_topic_relation;
    - activebrief_relation_state;
    - activebrief_relation_llm_used;
    - activebrief_relation_decision;
    - activebrief_relation_activebrief.
    • GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT
      7.9. Deterministic Routing Decision Contract UID: GHOST-PREPROCESS-DECISION-CONTRACT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-TWO-DIMENSION-CLASSIFICATION Two Independent Classification Dimensions
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-NO-ACTIVEBRIEF Routing State: No ActiveBrief
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-SAME Routing State: Strong and Same Topic
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-SAME Routing State: Weak and Same Topic
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-RELATED Routing State: Strong and Related Domain
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-RELATED Routing State: Weak and Related Domain
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-STRONG-IRRELEVANT Routing State: Strong and Irrelevant
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-STATE-WEAK-IRRELEVANT Routing State: Weak and Irrelevant
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-FINAL-MODE-AUTHORITY Final Prompt Mode Authority
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-MEMORY-POLICY-AUTHORITY Memory Context Permission Authority
      • GHOST-PREPROCESS-ROUTING-EXTRAS Relation and Routing Metadata in SuperPrompt
